03 — Experience

May 2022 — Aug 2022
Avyay Solutions
Machine Learning Intern
Improved OCR model accuracy by 15% through targeted data profiling, outlier reduction, and redesigned preprocessing pipelines. Built automated benchmarking tools that expanded performance test coverage by 40%.
OCR Python Pandas NumPy Google OCR
May 2019 — Aug 2020
Krypt, Inc.
Documentation Intern
Produced and streamlined 20+ pages of AI/ML technical documentation, improving onboarding speed by 25%. Interviewed senior engineers to capture workflows and convert them into standardized technical references adopted by engineering and QA teams.
Technical Writing AI/ML Compliance Documentation

04 — Projects

001
ASL Video Translator
Real-time ASL-to-English system using OpenCV, MediaPipe, TensorFlow, and ChatGPT achieving sub-150ms inference latency. Authored two research papers submitted to IEEE and JMAI.
OpenCV MediaPipe TensorFlow ChatGPT
002
Thinkorswim Trading Bot
Versatile trading bot harnessing AI, chart signals, and diverse indicators, enriched by a trader's market expertise. Built around ThinkorSwim APIs with rule-based execution frameworks.
Python ThinkorSwim API AI Indicators
003
HearSay
App that translates ASL gestures into spoken audio in real-time for phone calls — bridging communication gaps with computer vision and NLP.
ASL Computer Vision Real-time NLP
004
Debrief
Meeting debrief agent that gathers context from Zoom meetings and turns ideas into action. Automates the gap between conversation and execution.
AI Agent Zoom API NLP Automation
005
Signal
Lead monitoring tool for business owners looking for their niche. Tracks signals and surfaces opportunities automatically.
Python Monitoring Data Pipeline
006
Centra
Productivity app designed for the modern addiction — helping users reclaim focus and build healthier digital habits through intelligent tracking.
Productivity Behavioral ML React
